# Profit Pathfinder

> Free Coast FIRE tracker, early retirement calculators, dividend tracking, and investing tools — plan financial independence in your browser.

Profit Pathfinder is a free web platform for people pursuing financial independence and early retirement (FIRE). The flagship tool is the Coast FIRE Tracker — find the amount you need invested today for compound growth alone to reach your full FIRE number by retirement.

## FIRE Tools

- [Coast FIRE Tracker](/coast-fire-tracker): Flagship tool. Calculate your Coast FIRE number, track gap and % progress, compare scenarios.
- [Coast FIRE Calculator](/coast-fire-calculator): One-time calculation of your Coast FIRE number using current age, retirement age, spending, SWR, and real return.
- [What Is Coast FIRE?](/what-is-coast-fire): Beginner explanation of Coast FIRE, formula, and how it differs from traditional FIRE.
- [FIRE for Beginners](/fire-for-beginners): Beginner guide to FIRE, savings rate, withdrawal rates, and early retirement planning.
- [Early Retirement Calculator](/early-retirement-calculator): FIRE number, years to FI, and savings-rate impact.
- [Financial Independence Calculator](/financial-independence-calculator): Years to FI using the 4% rule, savings rate, and returns.
- [FIRE Guide](/fire-guide): Lean, Fat, Barista, and Coast FIRE explained with inflation-adjusted numbers.
- [Retirement Planning](/retirement-planning): FIRE, Roth conversion, Social Security, and withdrawal strategies.

## Investing Tools

- [Dividend Tracker](/dividend-tracker): Yield on cost, CAGR, and dividend income projections.
- [Monthly Dividend Calculator](/monthly-dividend-calculator): DRIP compounding and monthly passive income from dividends.
- [Options Toolkit](/options-portfolio): Covered calls, the Wheel, PMCC, iron condors, and Greeks.
- [Covered Call Calculator](/covered-call-calculator): Premium income, breakeven, and annualized return.
- [Options Guide](/options-guide): Educational guide to options strategies, basic to advanced.
- [Credit Options Guide](/credit-options-guide): Credit spreads, cash-secured puts, and risk-defined income trades.
- [Fundamental Analysis Guide](/fundamental-analysis-guide): CAN SLIM methodology and ratio appropriateness matrix.
- [0DTE Scanner](/zero-dte): Same-day options chains for SPY, QQQ, and major indices.
- [Trading Toolkit](/trading-toolkit): Position sizing, risk calculators, and trade utilities.
- [All Tools](/all-tools): Directory of every Profit Pathfinder tool.

## Lifestyle Calculators

- [Real Estate Calculator](/real-estate): Rental income, ROI, and mortgage analysis.
- [Car Finance Calculator](/car-finance): Auto loans, depreciation, and total cost of ownership.

## Optional

- [Install](/install): Install Profit Pathfinder as a mobile or desktop app.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free and Pro tier details.
